title: Momonosuke Faces Wano’s Future
description: On pages 34–37, this part focuses on Unknown person #32, Unknown person #33, Unknown person #34, Unknown person #35, King as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Oh no. I've said too much!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: igaram, do you know what I'm thinking?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No!! I don't know!! I don't know!! I have to get to work!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No! No!! This isn't a game!! It's deadly business!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I can't sit idly by while they de- Stroy ala- basta!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: What're you doing?! It's only one ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I just have one question for you, Princess VIVI.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 24 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
